category_sources: Official X.Org man page describes xdpyinfo as a display information utility for X.
source_facts.description says it is an X.Org utility for displaying information about an X server.
display_name_sources: Official X.Org man page title/name is xdpyinfo.
docs_sources: Official X.Org manual page for xdpyinfo.
repo_sources: X.Org release documentation points contributors to gitlab.freedesktop.org for X.Org code management; project path follows official xorg/app module naming.
tags_sources: Official X.Org man page describes querying X server display information.
